title: Nexus AddScheduleRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/orchestration/schedules — create a new schedule.

creator_id.description: Creator ID that owns this schedule.

preset_id.description: Preset ID to run (e.g. novel-writing, game-bible, script-writing).

seed.description: Optional seed text for the preset's initial context.

label.description: Human-readable label for this schedule run.

depends_on.description: Schedule IDs this schedule depends on (must complete before this starts).

scheduled_at.description: Unix timestamp string for deferred execution.

input.description: Structured input context for the preset (key-value pairs).

force_gates.description: When true, bypass preset gate evaluation. Requires reason.

reason.description: Audit reason for force_gates (required when force_gates is true).
